title: Draft a concise professional email reply
instruction: Write a concise and professional reply in English. Keep it to one short paragraph, include a brief thanks or acknowledgement, and acknowledge the schedule risk.
expected: A short English email reply that acknowledges the delay request and sounds professional.

title: Summarize an English product brief in Chinese
instruction: 用中文总结成 3 条要点，使用 bullet list。
expected: Three Chinese bullet points summarizing the main launch message.

title: Rewrite an informal Slack message in a professional tone
instruction: Rewrite this into more professional written English while keeping the meaning.
expected: A more polished written-English version of the Slack message.

title: Extract bullet points from a dense paragraph
instruction: Turn this into a concise bullet list with 4 items.
expected: A four-item bullet list capturing the main benchmark requirements.

title: Shorten a verbose announcement
instruction: Shorten this substantially in English while keeping the core launch message and the named core capabilities.
expected: A significantly shorter English version that preserves the main product message.
